candidates.row_label: Depreciation and write-downs of tangible fixed assets
candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above EBIT, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and could relate to broader operating expenses; adding it to the selected COGS row 'Purchased goods and services' would risk misclassification.

candidates.row_label: Amortization and write-downs of intangible fied assets
candidates.why: Separate operating amortization line above EBIT, but not identified as belonging to COGS specifically; could span multiple operating functions.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of tangible fixed assets - Balancing value
candidates.why: Looks like a component/detail of the tangible depreciation line rather than a distinct COGS-specific D&A row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of intangible fixed assets - Balancing value
candidates.why: Looks like a component/detail of the intangible amortization line rather than a distinct COGS-specific D&A row.
Blank/empty row with no visible values; not usable as a standalone add-back row.

variables.notes: Explicit D&A rows exist separately from the selected COGS row, but none are labelled as COGS/cost-of-sales related. To avoid double counting or misallocation, no COGS-specific D&A row is selected.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and write-downs of tangible fixed assets
candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above EBIT and outside the selected XSGA component rows, but it is not labelled as SG&A/admin/overhead specific; could include production or mixed-function depreciation.

candidates.row_label: Amortization and write-downs of intangible fied assets
candidates.why: Separate operating amortization line above EBIT and outside the selected XSGA component rows, but not explicitly tied to SG&A and could be company-wide or mixed-function.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of tangible fixed assets - Balancing value
candidates.why: Appears to be a component/detail of the tangible depreciation total, so using it would risk double counting if the summary line were ever used.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of intangible fixed assets - Balancing value
candidates.why: Appears to be a component/detail of the intangible amortization total, so using it would risk double counting if the summary line were ever used.
Blank/empty row with no visible values; not usable as a standalone add-back row.

variables.notes: Separate D&A lines are visible above EBIT, but none are clearly attributable to the selected XSGA bucket ('Other external costs' + 'Personnel Costs'). With no dedicated R&D row and no SG&A-specific D&A labels, the conservative choice is to leave XSGA_DA empty pending manual review.
